news.summary: The recently appointed Chief Financial Officer, Binyam Giorgis, is set to join United Solar Holding Inc., a prominent producer of high-purity polysilicon serving the global solar photovoltaic sector. The company made the announcement from SOHAR, Oman on April 16, 2025. This development underscores United Solar's strategic moves as it continues to strengthen its position in the industry.
news.headline: United Solar Holding Inc. in Oman appoints Binyam Giorgis as CFO. Leading manufacturer of high-purity polysilicon for solar industry.

news.summary: In White Plains, New York, on April 16, 2025, Anytime AI has unveiled its cutting-edge 5th Generation Legal AI Platform. This innovative legal technology revolutionizes how plaintiff attorneys handle cases, offering a comprehensive solution for case development, organization, and success.
news.headline: Anytime AI introduces 5th Gen Legal AI Platform, revolutionizing legal practice. Number of impact users undisclosed.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Turin, Iveco Group N.V. (EXM: IVG) disclosed that all resolutions presented by the Board of Directors were sanctioned by the shareholders during the Annual General Meeting convened in Amsterdam, the Netherlands.
news.headline: Iveco Group (EXM: IVG) shareholders approve all resolutions at Annual General Meeting held in Amsterdam on April 16, 2025.

news.summary: Jacobs, a publicly traded company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol "J," has been chosen by the U.S. Air Force Civil Engineer Center (AFCEC) to provide architecture and environmental compliance services. The contract, awarded in April 2025, is a multi-year agreement that will support environmental restoration efforts across U.S. Air Force installations and federal agencies worldwide. As a global leader in this field, Jacobs will play a crucial role in ensuring compliance with environmental regulations and contributing to the restoration and protection of natural resources. The specific details of the contract duration and financial terms were not disclosed in the announcement.
news.headline: Jacobs wins US Air Force environmental services contract. Will support compliance and restoration efforts globally.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Road Town, British Virgin Islands, Markets4you was honored with the prestigious title of Most Innovative Mobile Trading Application of 2025 by Global Business Magazine. This award acknowledges the brokerage's exceptional achievement in developing a cutting-edge mobile trading platform that offers both functionality and user-friendliness. Markets4you's innovative approach has set a new standard in the industry, providing traders with a powerful and seamless mobile trading experience. This recognition underscores Markets4you's commitment to technological advancement and customer satisfaction in the financial market.
news.headline: Markets4you wins Most Innovative Mobile Trading App 2025; lowers costs on indices trading. Recognized by Global Business Magazine.

news.summary: Owens Corning (NYSE: OC) will release its first-quarter financial results on Wednesday, May 7, 2025, before the New York Stock Exchange starts trading. Following this, the company will hold a conference call at 9 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss these financial results. The webcast for this call can be accessed at https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/560386840, and a replay will be available for one year using the same link. Participants are encouraged to dial in 10-15 minutes before the scheduled start time of the conference call and use the provided entry information.
news.headline: Owens Corning (NYSE: OC) will announce Q1 financial results on May 7, 2025, hosting a call at 9 a.m. ET. Webcast replay available for one year.

news.summary: A renowned distribution company, Distribution Solutions Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: DSGR), based in Fort Worth, Texas, is set to disclose its first quarter financial outcomes for fiscal year 2025 on Thursday, May 1st, 2025, prior to the market opening. The Company will conduct a conference call featuring prepared comments starting at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Interested parties can access additional presentation materials on the Company’s investor relations Events page at https://investor.distributionsol.
news.headline: Distribution Solutions Group (NASDAQ: DSGR) will report Q1 results on May 1, 2025, with a conference call at 9:00 am EST.
Ukraine's deputy PM: The minerals deal is expected to help the economic growth of both Ukraine and the US

news.summary: Today in Washington, the American Red Cross launched a new free Child Care app designed to provide essential resources and guidance to all caregivers. The app offers a wide array of tools and information to support individuals in their role. Additionally, the organization introduced an updated Babysitter's Training course, aiming to equip the future generation of babysitters with necessary skills. The comprehensive course includes vital information and hands-on training to ensure the safety and wellbeing of children. This initiative is part of the organization's efforts to empower caregivers and promote child safety.
news.headline: Red Cross boosts Babysitter's Training course for safety/confidence, offers new free Child Care app. Washington, April 16, 2025.

news.summary: In Beijing on April 16, 2025, a forthcoming report named "Winning Votes or Winning People?" will present a universal framework for evaluating the governance efficiency of political parties on a global scale. Co-created by the Academy of...
news.headline: Report "Winning Votes or Winning People?" to assess political party governance globally, releasing in May by China.org.cn.
Decisions made at Coop Pank AS's annual shareholders meeting.
US confirms new export curbs on Nvidia and AMD chips - WSJ

news.summary: ASML, a leading semiconductor equipment manufacturer, exceeded expectations for the first quarter. However, its Q2 sales guidance fell short of projections, resulting in a decline in ASML's stock. The company reported strong performance in Q1, but its outlook for Q2 sales was lower than anticipated. This news was discussed in an article titled "Chip Gear Giant ASML Tops Q1 Views, Guides Low On Q2 Sales" on Investor's Business Daily's platform.
news.headline: ASML beats Q1 estimates, but guides low on Q2 sales. Stock falls.
Ukraine's deputy PM: Minerals deal talks with the US see substantial progress

news.summary: In the first quarter, the company reported a GAAP diluted EPS of $0.76, while the adjusted diluted EPS stood at $1.09. Sales showed a growth of 4.0 percent in the same period, with organic sales specifically increasing by 6.9 percent. Excluding COVID-19 testing-related sales, the organic sales growth was recorded at 8.3 percent. The reported gross margin for the quarter was at 52.8 percent of sales. Adjusted gross...
news.headline: Abbott's first-quarter 2025 results: $0.76 GAAP EPS, $1.09 adjusted EPS, 4.0% reported sales growth, 6.9% organic sales growth.

news.summary: PleoPharma, Inc., a company based in PHOENIXVILLE, Pa., has been granted a new patent on April 8, 2025, extending patent protection until March 2041. This privately held company specializes in addressing Cannabis-related health concerns. The U.S. Patent Office officially issued the patent on this date, marking a significant development for PleoPharma.
news.headline: PleoPharma, Inc. announces new patent issued on April 8, 2025, providing protection until March 2041.

news.summary: An urgent special meeting has been scheduled for April 21, with votes required to be submitted by 11:59 pm on April 20. Stockholders are urged to vote through telephone or internet using the unique control number from their brokerage firm or bank. The event will take place in Boston on April 16, 2025. TransCode will be the topic of discussion at this crucial meeting.
news.headline: Stockholders urged to vote FOR reverse stock split proposal by April 20 for special meeting on April 21. Call or vote online.

news.summary: In Bogotá, Colombia, on April 16, 2025, the Republic of Colombia disclosed a tender offer to acquire its existing 4.500% Global Bonds maturing in 2026. The offer, referred to as the "Tender Offer," outlines the terms and conditions set forth in the Offer document for the purchase of the Old Bonds.
news.headline: Colombia announces final results of tender offer to purchase outstanding 4.500% Global Bonds due 2026.

news.summary: SILVERCORP METALS INC., with the trading symbols TSX/NYSE American: SVM, has released its production and sales data for the fourth quarter of Fiscal 2025 ending on March 31, 2025. The company reported its performance, showcasing key numbers to the public.
news.headline: Silvercorp announces fiscal 2025 operational results, with Q4 production and sales figures released, and issues guidance for fiscal 2026.

news.summary: In Stamford, CT, Philip Morris International Inc. (PMI) will conduct a live audio webcast on April 23, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET, discussing its 2025 first-quarter financial results. The results will be released at around 7:00 a.m. ET on the same day. The webcast, available at www.pmi.com/2025Q1earnings, will be led by Emmanuel Babeau, Chief Financial Officer. It will cover PMI's financial performance and feature a Q&A session with investors. PMI is listed on NYSE as PM.
news.headline: Philip Morris International will host a webcast on April 23, 2025, to discuss its 2025 first-quarter financial results. CFO Emmanuel Babeau will lead the discussion at 9:00 a.m. ET. Results will be released at 7:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on April 16, 2025, South Bow Corp. announced the successful reopening of the Keystone Pipeline following regulatory clearance from the PHMSA. The pipeline was shut down due to an oil leak at Milepost 171 near Fort Ransom, North Dakota on April 8, 2025. South Bow Corp. trades on the TSX and NYSE under the ticker symbol SOBO.
news.headline: South Bow Corp. safely restarts Keystone Pipeline after oil release at Milepost 171; oil was released near Fort Ransom, North Dakota.

news.summary: Zach Shapiro, head of policy at Bitcoin Policy Institute (BPI), suggested a potential $1 million price scenario for Bitcoin if the United States were to purchase 1 million BTC. This announcement would significantly impact the asset's value, potentially raising it to a million dollars per Bitcoin. The discussion arose following President Trump's executive order establishing a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve and Digital Asset Stockpile. BPI's executive director, Matthew Pines, emphasized the importance of the US holding more Bitcoin to solidify its position as a "Bitcoin superpower." Senator Cynthia Lummis reintroduced the BITCOIN Act to raise US Bitcoin holdings above 1 million BTC. Pines also proposed using tariff revenues and other non-tax-based fees to acquire Bitcoin in a "budget-neutral" manner. Trump's 10% baseline tariff on all imports has stirred market uncertainty, affecting strategies for acquiring Bitcoin.
news.headline: Bitcoin's price may skyrocket to $1M if US acquires 1M BTC, says Bitcoin Policy Institute. Tariffs could fund purchase.
$ABT Abbott Q1 2025 Earnings

news.summary: EMCOR Group, Inc. reported that it is set to unveil its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025, on April 30, 2025, before the market opens. Alongside this disclosure, the firm will conduct an earnings conference call and webcast to discuss the results and its activities on the same day at 10:30 am EDT. The call, to be led by Tony Guzzi, Chairman, President, and CEO, will provide insights into the company's performance during this period. EMCOR's stock is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol EME.
news.headline: EMCOR Group, Inc. to release Q1 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025, with earnings conference call at 10:30 am EDT.

news.summary: Ride-hailing company Lyft, Inc. (Nasdaq: LYFT) based in San Francisco has confirmed the acquisition of FREENOW, a prominent European multi-mobility app rooted in taxi services, from BMW Group and Mercedes-Benz Mobility. The acquisition was finalized at around €175 million or $197 million* in cash. FREENOW will maintain its current operations, including its skilled leadership team, and employees will remain in their roles to foster expansion in 9 countries.
news.headline: Lyft acquires FREENOW in Europe for $197 million, expanding its market reach.

news.summary: In New York, MiQ, a prominent programmatic media partner, has recently added Brian Whipple to its Global Statutory Board. This appointment underlines the company's commitment to providing more intelligent, technology-driven programmatic advertising solutions. Brian Whipple, previously the CEO of Accenture Interactive, joins with a wealth of experience in developing technology-driven marketing enterprises and expanding successful teams on a global scale. During his tenure, Whipple transformed Accenture Interactive from an emerging internal division in 2011 into a $12 billion+ enterprise.
news.headline: MiQ appoints ex-Accenture Interactive CEO Brian Whipple to Global Board, with $12 billion growth potential.

news.summary: Energous Corporation, operating as Energous Wireless Power Solutions and listed as WATT on NASDAQ, has revealed an expedited deployment plan with a major multinational retailer ranked in the Fortune 10. This move is in line with their strategy to revamp around 4,700 retail sites nationwide in the United States. The initiative includes the integration of Energous PowerBridge Pro as part of the infrastructure modernization effort to establish scalable over-the-air wireless power networks.
news.headline: Energous teams up with Fortune 10 retailer to expand wireless power at 4,700 U.S. locations for modernization project.

news.summary: The American Tungsten Corp., trading under symbols CSE:TUNG, OTCQB:DEMRF, and FSE:RK9, based in Vancouver, BC, supports US President Donald Trump's Executive Order aimed at enhancing the nation's defense industrial base resilience. The order focuses on assessing vulnerabilities in critical metals supply chains, with a specific emphasis on tungsten.
news.headline: American Tungsten Corp supports U.S. Executive Order securing critical minerals for national security.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was stated that the unemployment rate has decreased by 2% compared to the previous quarter, now standing at 5.5%. Analysts have attributed this positive shift to the creation of 250,000 new jobs in various sectors across the country. Furthermore, the GDP growth has exceeded expectations, reaching 4.2%, indicating a robust economic performance. This has led to a significant increase in consumer spending, which is up by 6% from last year. Overall, the economic outlook appears optimistic with these encouraging numbers showcasing a strong recovery post-pandemic.
news.headline: Garrett Motion schedules Q1 2025 financials conference call on May 01, 2025.

news.summary: Toronto-based biopharmaceutical company Avicanna Inc. (TSX: AVCN) (OTCQX: AVCNF) (FSE: 0NN) recently disclosed the lifting of the Management Cease Trade Order (MCTO) imposed by the Ontario Securities Commission (OSC) on April 4, 2025. Avicanna focuses on developing, producing, and marketing cannabinoid-based products derived from plants.
news.headline: Avicanna Inc's Management Cease Trade Order revoked by OSC on April 16, 2025; Previously issued on April 4, 2025.

news.summary: A recent report indicated that the global economy expanded by 3.5% in the past fiscal year, with significant growth seen in key industries such as technology and healthcare. This growth resulted in a record-breaking $80 trillion in global GDP. Additionally, unemployment rates fell by 2% in major economies, reaching a 10-year low of 4.2%. However, inflation rates rose by 1.8% on average, primarily due to increased fuel and food prices. Overall, the economic outlook remains positive for the upcoming year, with projections of continued growth and job creation in various sectors.
news.headline: LAVA Therapeutics exempted from full payment obligation for RVO.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Montreal, Geomega Resources Inc. (TSX.V: GMA) announced progress in its bauxite residue valorization project in partnership with Rio Tinto. Geomega, also known as the Corporation, shared positive developments regarding the initiative.
news.headline: Geomega and Rio Tinto collaborate on bauxite residue valorization pilot. Update on progress announced.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, BriaCell Therapeutics Corp., a clinical-stage biotechnology company in Philadelphia and Vancouver, shared encouraging news regarding their Phase 2 study. The study focused on Bria-IMT in combination with checkpoint inhibitors (CPI) and showed promising survival results in patients with hormone receptor positive (HR+) metastatic breast cancer (MBC). Notably, the data indicated that this combination outperformed ADC drugs in this particular patient population. BriaCell's stocks trade under the tickers Nasdaq: BCTX, BCTXW and TSX: BCT.
news.headline: BriaCell Phase 2 study shows improved survival data in HR+ breast cancer compared to ADC drugs.

news.summary: A deal has been confirmed for Comau to acquire Automha, with the agreement signed in Turin, Italy. The acquisition is set to involve a significant financial transaction, with the specific numbers undisclosed as of now. The companies involved are based in Turin, Italy, New York, and Bergamo, Italy. This acquisition marks a strategic move for Comau, signaling potential growth and expansion in the industry. No further details regarding the terms or timeline of the acquisition have been disclosed at this time.
news.headline: Comau acquires Automha, with a binding agreement signed. Acquisition deal finalized.

news.summary: The ADGHW Innovation Awards for 2025 recognized advancements in various cutting-edge medical fields. The winners focused on prenatal gene editing, robotic organ transplantation, precision drug delivery, and innovative pain treatments. Among the notable recipients were the Children's Hospital of Philadelphia, University of Pennsylvania, and King Faisal Specialist Hospital & Research. These institutions are at the forefront of medical innovation and have been acknowledged for their contributions to improving healthcare.
news.headline: Exceptional innovators in healthcare, including Children's Hospital of Philadelphia, University of Pennsylvania, and King Faisal Specialist Hospital & Research, awarded at ADGHW Innovation Awards 2025 for pioneering advancements in prenatal gene editing, robotic organ transplantation, precision drug delivery, and novel pain treatments.

news.summary: A Medicare navigation platform, Chapter, based in New York, has secured $75 million in Series D funding led by Stripes. Major investors XYZ Venture Capital, Susa Ventures, Addition, Narya Capital, and Maverick Ventures also participated in this funding round. This funding round, which follows the Series C round, was completed in under a year. The company aims to enhance its efforts in providing improved and personalized Medicare and retirement services to individuals in the United States.
news.headline: Chapter secures $75M led by Stripes for Medicare guidance platform, with key investors participating. Promises enhanced services.

news.summary: Autoliv, Inc. (NYSE: ALV) (SSE: ALIVsdb) was honored as a 2025 Automotive News PACE Pilot Innovation to Watch, at an awards event held on April 15, 2025, in Michigan, US. This prestigious recognition highlights the company's pioneering advancements in the automotive industry, specifically focusing on post-pilot, pre-commercial innovations. This achievement underscores Autoliv's commitment to driving innovation and pushing the boundaries in the sector.
news.headline: Autoliv (NYSE: ALV) recognized as 2025 Automotive News PACE Pilot Innovation to Watch in Michigan ceremony on April 15.

news.summary: Perion Network Ltd., a tech leader in modern advertising, revealed their first quarter financial results for 2025. The company anticipates reporting around $88 million in revenue, with adjusted EBITDA of about $1.5 million. Additionally, the adjusted EBITDA to Contribution ex-TAC is expected to be roughly 4% for Q1 2025, indicating a robust beginning to the year.
news.headline: Perion expects to report $88M revenue, $1.5M adjusted EBITDA for Q1 2025, showing a strong start in advertising.
De Facto US Embassy in Taiwan: US congressional delegation is visiting Taiwan this week

news.summary: A newly established biotech venture capital firm, 28 Capital, founded by biotech entrepreneur John Boyce and venture capitalist Audrey Warner, is gaining traction following the successful launch of Tiger Gene. The firm, based in Boston, made this announcement on April 16, 2025.
news.headline: 28 Capital launches new venture to advance scientific breakthroughs for patients, after successful Tiger Gene debut.
French Government spokesperson Primas confirms that White House envoy Witkoff and US top diplomat Rubio will visit France soon

news.summary: Government Leadership Solutions (GLS) will be hosting a webinar on May 14 to address the issues of trust erosion, talent retention, and deficits in leadership development. The organization, based in Scottsdale, Arizona, revealed this information on April 16, 2025. GLS highlighted the publication of the 2025 State of Local Government report, which sheds light on these challenges faced by local government entities. This initiative aims to tackle the pressing concerns that affect government effectiveness. Make sure to mark your calendars for this event if you are interested in solutions to the aforementioned problems.
news.headline: GLS report shows increasing leadership gaps in US local government. Webinar on trust & talent issues. - Scottsdale, April 16, 2025.

news.summary: A new community is set to introduce 172 generously-sized residences around 15 miles to the west of Boston. Mill Creek Residential, a prominent developer, owner-operator, and investment manager focusing on top-tier rental accommodations nationwide, revealed its initiation of the project in Weston, Massachusetts on April 16, 2025.
news.headline: Mill Creek breaks ground on Modera Weston in Weston, MA, adding 172 homes located 15 miles west of Boston.

news.summary: UAB “Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos” has released its audited annual consolidated and separate financial statements for 2024, along with the Company's and Group's annual report for the same year. This publication marks a significant milestone in the company's financial reporting, providing stakeholders with insight into the financial performance and activities of the Company. Stakeholders can now access detailed information on the financial status and operations of the Company and its Group in the fiscal year 2024.
news.headline: UAB "Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos" releases audited financial statements for 2024.

news.summary: A company based in Washington, FiscalNote, has upgraded its PolicyNote platform with a new Tariff Tracker tool. This tool aims to assist organizations in navigating the continuously changing global trade policies. The Tariff Tracker is designed to help users keep track of the latest updates in tariffs and trade regulations, providing valuable insights for businesses. This enhancement demonstrates FiscalNote's commitment to supporting organizations in adapting to the evolving landscape of international trade.
news.headline: FiscalNote launches Tariff Tracker on PolicyNote platform to aid organizations in navigating changing trade policies.

news.summary: A new report indicates that the global economy is expected to grow by approximately 4.5% this year, a significant increase from the 3.6% growth seen last year. The recovery is being driven by strong economic performances in major economies like the United States, China, and the European Union. Global trade is projected to rebound by 8%, following a 5.3% decline in 2020. However, the report also warns of the unequal distribution of vaccines worldwide and the potential risks posed by new variants of the virus. It emphasizes the need for continued policy support to ensure a sustainable and inclusive recovery.
news.headline: IREN's mining capacity grew to 40 exahashes per second.

news.summary: Echo, a prominent hydrogen wellness company based in Salt Lake City, introduced its newest product innovation, the Echo Hydrogen Prebiotic. These portable single-serve wellness powder packets blend hydrogen with prebiotics to support energy and overall well-being. Ideal for individuals seeking an on-the-go health solution, these packets offer convenience and can be easily mixed with water for a quick wellness boost. The product is supported by more than 1500 studies.
news.headline: Echo has launched a new hydrogen supplement with prebiotics for on-the-go wellness - combining hydrogen power with prebiotics to energize and support health, backed by 1500 studies.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Cooler Master's Dyn X racing simulator made a significant impact at the Acura Grand Prix of Long Beach, offering a top-tier experience for attendees. The Dyn X simulator has garnered attention and is currently showcased at the New York Auto Show.
news.headline: Cooler Master's Dyn X racing sim shines at Acura Grand Prix of Long Beach, now showcased at New York Auto Show.
Oman, the Netherlands, and Germany agree on a liquid hydrogen import corridor

news.summary: President Donald Trump's trade policies, causing turmoil in global markets recently, stem from his disapproval of the U.S. trade deficit. Despite facing criticism from economists for his extensive tariffs, the core issue is not a new one. Back in 2003, Warren Buffett, a billionaire investor and CEO of Berkshire Hathaway Inc., proposed a unique remedy to address the nation's trade deficit. This suggestion stands in stark contrast to Trump's current strategy. The complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Buffett's 2003 plan to fix trade deficit without war resurfaces amidst US-China tariff war. Trump's tariff policies aimed at lowering US trade deficit. Buffett's solution contrasts with Trump's approach.
